description_long: This is a single-story rectangular house with a modern, minimalist design, featuring a flat roof and a combination of dark and light exterior wall panels. The front facade includes a small porch with white railings, steps, and outdoor furniture, leading to a white entry door. Large, grid-style windows are distributed along the front and side walls, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The rear and one side of the house are clad in horizontal light gray siding with wooden accent panels, while the other side is mostly solid black with minimal openings. The interior layout is visible from above, showing distinct rooms and modern furnishings. The overall appearance is clean and contemporary, suitable for urban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story rectangular house with a flat roof, large grid windows, and a small front porch with white railings and steps. The exterior features a mix of dark and light panels with wooden accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the porch with white railings, entry door, large grid windows, and visible interior layout.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the light gray siding, wooden accent panels, and a glimpse of the interior rooms and backyard area.
description_view_2: Rear view with mostly solid light gray siding, large wooden accent panels, and minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a mostly solid black wall, the porch area, and the arrangement of interior spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large grid windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a white door, small porch with white railings, steps, and outdoor seating.
